name: Qwen OAuth
description: Qwen Portal via OAuth — reuses Qwen CLI credentials at ~/.qwen/oauth_creds.json with auto-refresh. Run 'qwen auth qwen-oauth' once to authenticate. Inference at portal.qwen.ai (OpenAI-compatible).

providers.label: Qwen OAuth (uses Qwen CLI auth — run 'qwen auth qwen-oauth' first)
